name: healthcare_whistleblower_allegation_claims_mesa_auto_ben
premise: Pharmacy cannot release a high-cost biologic until prior authorization clears; oncology wants an ethics-backed override pathway. In Healthcare, the situation tagged internally around healthcare whistleblower allegation claims mesa auto ben has converged with local pressure in the Stonehaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Engineering says a full fix needs a maintenance window; operations says waiting will predictably increase harm in the interim. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. The organization’s past incidents make autonomy feel morally loud today, while beneficence is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Arjun Dubois
agents.identity: I am Arjun Dubois, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Healthcare. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat beneficence as disposable collateral every time autonomy spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Elena Park
agents.identity: I am Elena Park, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Healthcare. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so autonomy cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes beneficence in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will sequence a conservative rollout: smallest blast radius first, documented exceptions only, and real appeals paths—even if autonomy advocates call that foot-dragging.
I will push a fast, organization-wide lever because partial fixes may leave the worst harm untouched—even if that compresses protections for beneficence.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Arjun Dubois must choose under autonomy versus beneficence. What does Arjun Dubois do?
